events.name: New York Knicks at Boston Celtics

highlights.headline: Knicks get big road win over the Celtics
highlights.description: The Knicks get 31 points from Jalen Brunson as they hand the Celtics a big loss in Boston.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks get big road win over the Celtics) 2026/02/08 ESHEET

highlights.headline: New York Knicks vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights
highlights.description: New York Knicks vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: LVOD_NBA Highlight (New York Knicks vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2026/02/08

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 31 points and Josh Hart added 19 to help the New York Knicks beat the cold-shooting Boston Celtics 111-89 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brunson's 31 points power Knicks past Celtics, snapping Boston's five-game winning streak

video.headline: New York Knicks vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: LVOD_NBA Highlight (New York Knicks vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2026/02/08

highlights.headline: Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights) 2026/02/08 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kasparas Jakucionis was 6 for 6 from 3-point range and scored 22 points, Bam Adebayo also had 22 and the Miami Heat routed the Washington Wizards 132-101 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jakucionis hits 6 3-pointers without a miss in Heat's 132-101 romp over Wizards

video.headline: Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights) 2026/02/08 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard had 41 points and eight rebounds and the Los Angeles Clippers beat the slumping Minnesota Timberwolves 115-96 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard scores 41 points to help the Clippers rout the slumping Timberwolves
